# docker_containers (Data Source)

Lists Docker containers from the local Docker daemon.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "docker_containers" "this" {}

output "container_fingerprint" {
  description = "Toy example mapping Container IDs to an md5sum fingerprint of its configuration"
  value       = { for c in data.docker_containers.this.containers : c.id => md5(jsonencode(c)) }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `containers` (Attributes List) List of Docker containers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--containers))
- `id` (String) The ID of this data source.

<a id="nestedatt--containers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `containers`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) The command used to run the container.
- `created` (Number) The Unix timestamp when the container was created.
- `id` (String) The Docker container ID.
- `image` (String) The image used by the container.
- `image_id` (String) The image ID used by the container.
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels applied to the container.
- `names` (List of String) The container names.
- `state` (String) The container state.
- `status` (String) The container status.
